title: xorq Catalog Index
description: Schema for xorq catalog.yaml index files. The catalog.yaml tracks all entry hashes and aliases stored in a catalog repository.

EntryName.description: A catalog entry name — a lowercase hex hash derived from the expression's build fingerprint (e.g. '6623dfa75d8c'). Corresponds to entries/<name>.zip in the catalog repo.

AliasName.description: A human-readable alias for a catalog entry. Corresponds to a symlink at aliases/<alias>.zip -> ../entries/<entry>.zip.

CatalogIndex.title: Catalog Index (current format)
CatalogIndex.description: Current catalog.yaml format containing separate lists of entry hashes and alias names.

entries.description: Ordered list of entry names (hex hashes) tracked by this catalog.

aliases.description: Ordered list of alias names defined in this catalog.

LegacyCatalogIndex.title: Catalog Index (legacy format)
LegacyCatalogIndex.description: Legacy catalog.yaml format: a plain list of entry names with no aliases section. Auto-converted to the current format on first write.

EntryMetadata.title: Entry Metadata
EntryMetadata.description: Schema for metadata/<entry>.zip.metadata.yaml files. Stores the MD5 checksum of the corresponding entry ZIP archive for integrity verification.

md5sum.description: MD5 hex digest of the entry's ZIP archive file.

IbisDataType.description: An ibis data type string as produced by ibis Schema serialisation.

IbisSchema.title: Ibis Schema
IbisSchema.description: A mapping of column names to ibis data type strings, as serialised by ibis Schema.

ExprKind.title: Expression Kind
ExprKind.description: Classifies how the stored expression is bound to its data sources.

ExprMetadata.title: Expression Metadata
ExprMetadata.description: Schema for expr_metadata.json inside each catalog entry ZIP archive. Describes the kind of the stored expression and its input/output schemas.

schema_in.description: Input schema. Present only when kind is 'unbound_expr'; describes the column types the expression expects its UnboundTable placeholder to receive.

schema_out.description: Output schema of the expression — the columns and types produced after all transformations.
